{{Infobox group
| name = High Council (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[High Council (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] is a three-member leadership body that serves as the voice of the [[Am’haranai]] and leads the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]]. Described by members as the architects and masons of the Empire, they view themselves as essential shepherds and counselors tasked with ensuring the realm's prosperity. Their role involves managing the stability of the Empire, which includes making strategic decisions regarding [[the Emperor]] and the potential deployment of the [[Regents]] as warriors to combat the [[Great Elders]]. The [[Council]] operates out of various locations, including an underground chamber and large conference rooms within the [[Island chapter house]]. Historically, they have worked to keep certain secrets buried and have spent years dismantling [[the Emperor]]'s global power network. In times of crisis, such as following the death of an Emperor, the [[Council]] may consult with [[Architects]], [[Readers]], and historians to determine the best course of action for the survival of the [[Consultant's Guild]] and the Empire at large.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The High [[Council]] sentenced [[Lucan]] to [[life]] imprisonment.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The High [[Council]] consists of three [[Architects]] who sit in the open around a short white column.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Council]] has orders for [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Council]] would consider [[Shera]] worth more than all the [[Gardeners]] combined.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Council]] issues commands to [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The High [[Council]] consists of three members.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As a group that holds power over the [[fate]] of the world, the High [[Council]] possesses the authority to execute [[Consultants]] who disclose secrets of the [[Guild]]. During this period, they sought to have [[Shera]] assassinate [[the Emperor]] earlier than originally planned, a move suggesting they may have possessed knowledge regarding [[the Emperor]]'s own intentions. The [[Council]] also ordered that the chamber housing the coffins be sealed away. Furthermore, they did not act in isolation when determining the status of [[Yala]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] wanted [[Shera]] to kill [[the Emperor]] ahead of schedule.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] is a group that may have known about [[the Emperor]]'s plan.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] ordered the room containing the coffins to be sealed up.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] did not make the decision regarding [[Yala]]'s status alone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] makes decisions about the [[fate]] of the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Council]] has the power to execute [[Consultants]] who reveal [[Guild]] secrets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“I have orders from the High Council,” she said, looking into his eyes with pleading.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"Gardener Meia," Shera said, in a mock-serious tone, "are you asking me to ignore the commands of the High Council?"<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Do you trust Yala and the High Council to make better decisions about the fate of the world than the Emperor?”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
